responsibilities: Provide a structured form for reporting bugs in ArchSpine
Collect detailed bug descriptions, reproduction steps, version info, logs, and environment details
Enforce required fields for description, reproduction steps, and ArchSpine version
Guide users to include relevant log output from .spine/logs/ if available
outOfScope: Performance or security reports outside bug context

English.purpose: This document is a standardized bug report template for the ArchSpine project. It aims to collect all necessary information from users to diagnose and resolve issues efficiently.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for anyone using ArchSpine who encounters a bug. This includes developers, integrators, and end-users. The template ensures that reports contain actionable data such as version, steps to reproduce, and logs, which helps maintainers quickly understand and fix the problem.
key_takeaways: Always include the ArchSpine version (output of `spine --version`).
Attach relevant log output, especially from `.spine/logs/`.
Mention your operating system and Node.js version under Environment.
